views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing today's mood state, current streak, weekly mood trend sparkline, emotion distribution donut, and quick check-in button

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Multi-step check-in flow: step 1 picks mood level via large emoji slider, step 2 selects emotions from a grid, step 3 tags activities and social context, step 4 optional reflection text

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Calendar heatmap colored by mood level (red-yellow-green gradient), tappable days revealing entries, scrollable timeline below with entry cards showing emotion icons and snippets

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Weekly and monthly mood trend line charts, emotion frequency bar chart, activity-mood correlation matrix showing which activities correlate with higher moods, time-of-day mood patterns, and AI-generated insight cards

views.name: PatternsView
views.purpose: Deep pattern analysis: day-of-week mood averages, social context impact rankings, sleep-mood correlation scatter, weather impact summary, and top mood-boosting activity combinations

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayEntries
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All check-in entries logged today, sorted by time

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayAverageMood
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average mood level across all of today's check-ins (1-10 scale)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayDominantEmotion
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Most frequently logged emotion today across all entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least one check-in, including today if logged

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyMoodAverage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average mood level for the current Mon-Sun week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyMoodTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Difference between this week's average and last week's average mood; positive means improving

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyMoodChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily average mood values for the past 7 days, suitable for sparkline rendering

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyMoodChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily average mood values for the past 30 days for trend chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: emotionFrequencyData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Frequency count of each emotion type over the past 30 days, sorted descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: activityMoodCorrelations
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average mood level associated with each activity tag, sorted by average mood descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: socialContextMoodAverages
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average mood when in each social context over the past 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dayOfWeekAverages
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of 7 average mood values indexed by weekday (0=Mon..6=Sun) over all history

viewModelComputedProperties.name: timeOfDayAverages
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average mood grouped by hour of day to reveal daily rhythm patterns

viewModelComputedProperties.name: sleepMoodCorrelation
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Pearson correlation coefficient between sleep quality and mood level over the past 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of daily check-in goal met today (e.g., 2 of 3 check-ins = 0.67)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: moodVolatility
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Standard deviation of mood levels over the past 7 days; high volatility triggers stability insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: generatedInsights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Dynamic insight cards: top mood booster activity, worst day pattern, sleep impact, social correlation, streak milestone, volatility alert, and weather impact

dailyGoal.description: Number of mood check-ins per day

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if it has at least one mood check-in entry. Streak breaks if any calendar day has zero entries.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare current week's average mood to previous week. Track 30-day moving average and flag when current week deviates by more than 1 point. Compute 7-day mood volatility (standard deviation) and flag when above 2.0 as 'emotionally turbulent period'.
insights: Mood Booster: identify the activity tag with highest average associated mood (min 3 occurrences) — e.g., 'Exercise days average 7.8 mood vs 5.2 overall'
Mood Drain: identify activity or social context with lowest average mood correlation — e.g., 'Work alone days average 4.1'
Best Day: which day of week has historically highest mood — e.g., 'Saturdays are your happiest day (avg 7.5)'
Sleep Impact: when sleep quality ≥ 4, show average mood vs when sleep quality ≤ 2 — e.g., 'Good sleep = 2.3 points higher mood'
Social Insight: compare mood when alone vs with friends/partner — e.g., 'You're 1.8 points happier with friends'
Streak Milestone: celebrate at 7, 14, 30, 60, 100, 365 day streaks with encouraging messages
Volatility Alert: when 7-day standard deviation > 2.0, suggest grounding activities or reflection
Weather Pattern: if enough weather data, correlate weather types with mood averages
Time Awareness: identify best and worst times of day for mood — e.g., 'Your mood peaks at 2pm and dips at 9pm'
Emotional Diversity: track how many unique emotions logged in past week; low diversity may indicate emotional suppression
Gratitude Effect: compare mood on days with gratitude notes vs without
